interface: core v1 Pod log subresource (stable); researched against v1.36 documentation and the official OpenAPI specification

auth.redirect_rule: the bearer token must never be sent to a different origin; any 3xx surfaces as KubeStatusException(code=<status>, reason=Redirect) instead of being followed

params.name: container
params.rule: the container to read; omitted when unset (defaults to the pod's only container)

params.name: follow
params.rule: stream the log; sent as follow=true only when following

params.name: tailLines
params.rule: lines from the end of the log; omitted when unset

params.name: timestamps
params.rule: prefix every line with an RFC3339 or RFC3339Nano timestamp; sent as timestamps=true only when on

log_subresource.query_encoding: parameters appear in alphabetical order (container, follow, tailLines, timestamps), values percent-encoded per RFC 3986

success.body: plain UTF-8 text streamed over chunked transfer; a read boundary can split a line and even a multi-byte UTF-8 sequence, so clients buffer bytes and split on 0x0A before decoding
success.final_line: a trailing line without a newline still counts as a line

errors.client_rule: a non-2xx log response body is a JSON meta/v1 Status even though a 200 streams text/plain; decode it into KubeStatusException{code, reason, statusMessage}

cancellation.rule: follow(namespace, pod, options, onLine) delivers each decoded line to the callback; when the callback returns false the collector stops reading, closes the stream and returns the number of lines delivered

merge_policy.timestamps: collect() forces timestamps=true on every per-pod request regardless of the caller's options, then splits each line at the first space into (timestamp, message)
merge_policy.order: lines are ordered by the parsed timestamp (Instant semantics — '08:00:01Z' precedes '08:00:01.500Z' even though a raw string compare says otherwise), ties broken by pod name ascending, then original per-pod order
merge_policy.identity: each merged line keeps its pod name and the original timestamp token verbatim
merge_policy.traversal: pods are fetched in the order given; a pod with an empty log contributes nothing
